72 _29A BLADR_ASTNC_ADMSN_CD (29a) Bladder Level of Assistance: Admission CHAR 2 A score indicating the level of assistance needed for the patient's bladder management at admission. Bladder management - level of assistance includes the safe use of equipment or agents for bladder management. 01 = Helper - Complete Dependence/Total Assistance (Subject less than 25%), 02 = Helper - Complete Dependence/Maximal Assistance (Subject 25% or
